title: ACEF Dataset Card Payload
description: Payload schema for dataset_card records. Captures training, validation, and test dataset documentation per EU AI Act Art. 10 and NIST MAP. Documents dataset characteristics, representativeness, known limitations, and quality assessments.

source.description: Source or origin of the dataset (e.g., organization name, URL, data collection campaign).

purpose.description: Purpose of this dataset in the AI system lifecycle.

collection_methodology.description: How the dataset was collected (e.g., web scraping, surveys, sensor data, licensed feeds).

representativeness_assessment.description: Assessment of whether the dataset is relevant, representative, error-free, and complete for its intended purpose (EU AI Act Art. 10 requirements).

geographic_coverage.description: Geographic regions represented in the dataset.

demographic_coverage.description: Demographic groups represented or covered in the dataset.

language_coverage.description: Languages represented in the dataset (BCP 47 tags).

known_limitations.description: Known limitations, biases, or gaps in the dataset.

quality_checks_performed.description: Data quality checks that were performed.

result.description: Result or outcome of the check.

bias_mitigation_methods.description: Methods used to detect and mitigate bias in the dataset.

curation_steps.description: Data curation steps performed (filtering, deduplication, cleaning, etc.).

annotation_methodology.description: How the dataset was annotated or labeled, if applicable.

ethical_review.description: Whether and how an ethical review of the dataset was conducted.

license.description: License under which the dataset is used.

personal_data_present.description: Whether the dataset contains personal data.

personal_data_handling.description: How personal data in the dataset is handled (anonymization, pseudonymization, consent, etc.).
